title: cleome foliosa var. foliosa
intro: Cleome foliosa var. foliosa is a plant species that belongs to the Cleomaceae family and is commonly known as the 'Fleshy Cleome'. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Cleome foliosa var. foliosa include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Cleome foliosa var. foliosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for various forms of administration to harness its medicinal properties.
